name: Strass Rye Bread
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Rye flour, or oat flour
1 1/2 cups Bread flour, or all purpose
2 tsp Fennel seeds, or anise seeds
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in the order specified by your mixer's mixing settings.
2. Place the mixture into the mixing bin and start the machine.
